enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a late-night daily vlog update covering his internet connectivity problems in Boulder, progress on a ski resort mapping project for Google Earth, caring for his geckos and gerbils (one gerbil ate the other), and his upcoming work schedule. He briefly teases a future video about being 'the only professional athlete in the world' tied to a concept about bikes, audio learning, and economic reinvention.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Frustrated that 1.5 Mbps is the best available due to old neighborhood infrastructure
Excited about it and eager to see it visualized on Google Earth
Enthusiastic about using ski run dimensions to build realistic fantasy city-states
Choosing not to do more videos tonight because it's too late

claims.subject: internet service
claims.claim: The internet in my neighborhood is really bad, and I can only get 1.5 Mbps because it's an old and bad neighborhood.

claims.subject: video uploads
claims.claim: I couldn't upload my video from the 17th until a couple of hours ago because everything was backed up due to slow internet.

claims.subject: ethernet cable
claims.claim: I have an ethernet cable, and I plan to use it at night to upload videos when I'm backed up.

claims.subject: mom's house
claims.claim: I had to go back to my mom's house when the internet technician came, but I couldn't do much because she was getting her house replaced.

claims.subject: Skimers work project
claims.claim: I've been working on a Skimers work project for a few days, initially got stuck on Boulder research, but now I'm focusing on the Skimers.

claims.subject: Google Earth
claims.claim: I'm adding distances to all the runs in Boulder to organize them on Google Earth.

claims.subject: geckos
claims.claim: My geckos' crickets arrived today, and I got a thousand of them in the third size down for full-grown geckos.

claims.subject: gecko cage
claims.claim: I cleaned the gecko cage for the first time in a couple of months and found a bunch of big beetles in there.

claims.subject: jurbles
claims.claim: I forgot to feed my jurbles, and one of them ate the other, leaving only a little bit of a tail.

claims.subject: work schedule
claims.claim: This week has slowed down, but I still have work on Thursday, Friday, and Saturday.

claims.subject: house cleaning
claims.claim: I plan to clean my house tomorrow, including vacuuming, because it's kind of weird and messy from all the gecko stuff.

claims.subject: Skores project
claims.claim: I'm excited to see what the Skores project looks like on Google Earth, where I'm rebuilding the school and creating fantasy city-states.

claims.subject: fantasy city-states
claims.claim: I'm creating fantasy city-states where people live in 10x10 meter houses as tall as the lifts, with populations based on the size of the city walls.

claims.subject: future video ideas
claims.claim: I want to make a video about being the only professional athlete in the world, extending the 'most powerful person in Boulder' concept, and reinventing education and the economic system using bikes and audio bugs.

claims.subject: audio logs
claims.claim: I want to keep up with my audio logs and plan to do more videos tomorrow, but it's too late now.
